texto: Mathematics are the result of mysterious powers which no one understands, and which the unconscious recognition of beauty must play an important part. Out of an infinity of designs a mathematician chooses one pattern for beauty's sake and pulls it down to earth.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marston Morse sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Mathematics are the result of mysterious powers which no one understands, and which the unconscio…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, mathematics, earth, útil em momentos de earth e play.
